perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Non-live action animation. A dark-haired character tells a bald character he is going to shower; the bald character looks nervous. (2) The bald character sits on the bed sweating and shaking, with dramatic facial expressions of panic as he overthinks the situation. (3) Scene cuts to the bald character in the shower, looking stressed and looking towards the door. (4) He comes out to find the dark-haired character already asleep and snoring. (5) Morning arrives, the bald character is on the phone looking tired while the other character is still in bed.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Casual conversation between two males starts with a neutral background tone. (2) Music becomes fast-paced and suspenseful as the character's internal panic begins. (3) Sound of a shower running and a light click sound are heard. (4) Comical, loud snoring sounds replace the music. (5) Cheerful morning bird chirping begins, followed by a dialogue between a male and a female voice over a phone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text: Subtitles translating the dialogue between characters throughout. (2) Decorative/Hook text: Large variety-style captions like '誰不會洗澡' (Who doesn't know how to shower) and '到底哪個' (Which one exactly) emphasize the character's confusion. (3) Permanent hook text at the bottom: '第一次住學長家 以為有那個結果那個' (Staying at a senior's house for the first time, I thought that would happen but then that happened) and '完整影片左Youtube' (Full video on YouTube).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Dialogue -> Internal Monologue/Panic -> Anti-climax -> Next day resolution

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 bald male character, 1 dark-haired male character, 1 female character displayed as a profile icon on a phone screen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One bald male character in a black t-shirt and one dark-haired male character often seen shirtless with a towel.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple animated room with a bed, green curtains, and a bathroom with a sink and mirror.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Flat animation lighting, darkens during the night scenes.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Setup -> Expectation/Anxiety -> Anti-climax -> Reality Check
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses animation to humorously portray social anxiety and the over-interpretation of simple actions (like a roommate going to shower) to create a relatable 'expectation vs. reality' comedy sketch.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Signature '阿啾' (Achie) animation style and voice acting.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: High engagement comedy content focusing on relatable awkward social interactions for a younger audience.
